cheri-berry.enEffect: Cures being paralyzed. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
cheri-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒麻痺狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

chesto-berry.enEffect: Cures being asleep. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
chesto-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒睡眠狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

pecha-berry.enEffect: Cures being poisoned or badly poisoned. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
pecha-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒中毒、劇毒狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

rawst-berry.enEffect: Cures being burned. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
rawst-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒灼傷狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

aspear-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒冰凍狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

leppa-berry.enEffect: Restores 10 PP to a move when its PP is fully depleted. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
leppa-berry.zhEffect: 會讓PP變為0的招式回復10PP。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

oran-berry.enEffect: Restores 10 HP to the holder when its HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
oran-berry.zhEffect: 剩餘HP降到最大HP的1/2以下時， 會回復10HP。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

persim-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒混亂狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

lum-berry.enEffect: Cures any status condition or confusion. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
lum-berry.zhEffect: 可治癒所有異常狀態、混亂狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

sitrus-berry.enEffect: Restores 1/4 of the holder’s max HP when the holder’s HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
sitrus-berry.zhEffect: 剩餘HP降到最大HP的1/2以下時， 會回復最大HP的1/4。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

occa-berry.zhEffect: 受到效果絕佳的火屬性招式時， 傷害會減半。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

bright-powder.enEffect: Lowers the accuracy of moves used by opponents against the holder by 10%.
bright-powder.zhEffect: 對手對自己使用的招式的 命中率會變為0.9倍。

white-herb.enEffect: Restores the holder’s stats to their usual value when they are lowered. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
white-herb.zhEffect: 能力降低時，能夠讓能力復原。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

quick-claw.enEffect: Gives the holder’s moves a 20% chance of going first among moves of the same priority.
quick-claw.zhEffect: 有20%的機率會在相同優先度的 招式中第一個行動。

mental-herb.enEffect: Cures the holder of the Infatuated, Taunted, Unable to Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, and Encore statuses. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
mental-herb.zhEffect: 可治癒著迷、挑釁、不可連續、 招式封鎖、回復封鎖、再來一次狀態。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

kings-rock.enEffect: When the holder deals damage with its moves, there is a 10% chance that targets will flinch.
kings-rock.zhEffect: 用招式給予傷害時， 有10%的機率會讓對手畏縮。

silver-powder.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Bug-type moves by 20%.
silver-powder.zhEffect: 蟲屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

focus-band.enEffect: If the holder takes damage from a move that would knock it out, there’s a 10% chance the holder will endure the hit with 1 HP.
focus-band.zhEffect: 受到會瀕死的招式傷害時， 有10%的機率會剩下1HP撐過去。

scope-lens.enEffect: Gives the holder a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

metal-coat.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Steel-type moves by 20%.
metal-coat.zhEffect: 鋼屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

leftovers.enEffect: Restores 1/16 of the holder’s max HP at the end of every turn.
leftovers.zhEffect: 在回合結束時， 會回復最大HP的1/16。

light-ball.enEffect: When held by a Pikachu, doubles the holder’s Attack and Sp. Atk.
light-ball.zhEffect: 皮卡丘的攻擊、特攻會變為2倍。

soft-sand.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Ground-type moves by 20%.
soft-sand.zhEffect: 地面屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

hard-stone.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Rock-type moves by 20%.
hard-stone.zhEffect: 岩石屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

miracle-seed.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Grass-type moves by 20%.
miracle-seed.zhEffect: 草屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

black-glasses.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Dark-type moves by 20%.
black-glasses.zhEffect: 惡屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

black-belt.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Fighting-type moves by 20%.
black-belt.zhEffect: 格鬥屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

magnet.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Electric-type moves by 20%.
magnet.zhEffect: 電屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

mystic-water.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Water-type moves by 20%.
mystic-water.zhEffect: 水屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

sharp-beak.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Flying-type moves by 20%.
sharp-beak.zhEffect: 飛行屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

poison-barb.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Poison-type moves by 20%.
poison-barb.zhEffect: 毒屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

spell-tag.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Ghost-type moves by 20%.
spell-tag.zhEffect: 幽靈屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

twisted-spoon.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Psychic-type moves by 20%.
twisted-spoon.zhEffect: 超能力屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

charcoal.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Fire-type moves by 20%.
charcoal.zhEffect: 火屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

dragon-fang.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Dragon-type moves by 20%.
dragon-fang.zhEffect: 龍屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

silk-scarf.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Normal-type moves by 20%.
silk-scarf.zhEffect: 一般屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。

shell-bell.enEffect: When the holder deals damage with its moves, its HP is restored by 1/8 of the damage dealt.
shell-bell.zhEffect: 用招式給予傷害時， 會回復自己該傷害的 1/8的HP。

focus-sash.enEffect: If the holder has full HP and takes damage from a move that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. Disappears for the duration of the battle after a single use.
focus-sash.zhEffect: HP全滿時， 若受到一擊就會瀕死的招式傷害， 會剩下1HP撐過去。 使用1次後就會在該對戰中消失。

choice-scarf.enEffect: Boosts the holder’s Speed stat by 50%. However, once the holder uses a move, it becomes unable to use any other move but that one until it switches out of battle.
choice-scarf.zhEffect: 速度會變為1.5倍， 但一旦使出招式後， 直到替換前都只能使出該招式。

crabominite.enEffect: A held item that allows Crabominable to Mega Evolve.
crabominite.zhEffect: 能讓好勝毛蟹超級進化的持有物。

scovillainite.enEffect: A held item that allows Scovillain to Mega Evolve.
scovillainite.zhEffect: 能讓狠辣椒超級進化的持有物。

glimmoranite.enEffect: A held item that allows Glimmora to Mega Evolve.
glimmoranite.zhEffect: 能讓晶光花超級進化的持有物。

never-melt-ice.enEffect: Boosts the power of the holder’s Ice-type moves by 20%.
never-melt-ice.zhEffect: 冰屬性招式威力會變為1.2倍。
